revision.comment: create new maintenance category
1 revision imported
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{maintenance category|container=yes}} Maintenance categories for the [[Wikipedia:Article namespace|article (main) namespace]].
[[Category:Maintenance by namespace|Article]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Article maintenance]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{maintenance category|container=yes}} Maintenance categories for the [[Wikipedia:Article namespace|article (main) namespace]].
[[Category:Maintenance by namespace|Article]] [[en:Article maintenance]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 4 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}↵" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{maintenance category|container=yes}} {{wikidata link|Q100144401}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Article maintenance]] [[en:Category:Article maintenance]] [[Wikipedia:Article namespace|article (main) namespace]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Maintenance by namespace|Article]]

<!--templates--> {{maintenance category|container=yes}} {{wikidata link|Q100144401}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Article maintenance]] [[en:Category:Article maintenance]] [[Wikipedia:Article namespace|article (main) namespace]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Maintenance by namespace|Article]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{maintenance category|container=yes}} {{wikidata link|Q100144401}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Article maintenance]] [[en:Category:Article maintenance]] [[Wikipedia:Article namespace|article (main) namespace]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Maintenance by namespace|Article]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]
